source.notes: Issue 8 specialty coverage: skill tags are derived from every genre playbook proficiency list, not just the D&D base set or the active campaign seed.

input.playerInput: Try the whole toolbox at once. [Arcana (Drift Lore), Apothecary, Animal Handling, Xenotech, Net Architecture, Streetwise, Quantum Basketweaving]

narrator.prose: (unused — fixture asserts on roll-tag extraction and roll-gate helper output)
